title: Energy secretary says U.S. has ended Iran's ability to close Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Some 72 ships loaded with 19 million barrels of oil have passed through Hormuz in the past 24 hours, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said.
summary_public: Some 72 ships loaded with 19 million barrels of oil have passed through Hormuz in the past 24 hours, Energy Secretary Chris Wright said.

IR.label: neutral
